posts.text: War in the West has changed. Militarily, of course—stealth bombers have replaced Spitfires—but it has changed oratorically too. Fitting literary allusions are out. Jarring clips from Hollywood movies are in https://www.economist.com/culture/2026/04/23/the-rhetoric-of-war-has-changed-not-for-the-better?taid=69f1fc2a05fd1e0001604be9&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

posts.text: BREAKING: White House officials say President Trump has discussed with US oil companies a plan to potentially continue the US “blockade” of the Strait of Hormuz for months.

posts.text: Cameco and @WECNuclear were pleased to co-host the Executive Forum Reception, opening the @CanadaNuclear 2026: #PowerAndPurpose conference on Tuesday evening. Nuclear industry colleagues, Indigenous partners and representatives from government and utilities were in attendance to hear highlights about the Canadian-owned AP1000® reactor. http://ap1000.cameco.com
